channel.description: Process and Task Scheduling Review Questions Q. What are the two commands to list the PID of a specific process? A. The pidof and pgrep commands. Q. By default the *.allow files exist. True or False? A. False. By default, the *.deny files exist. Q. Where do the scheduling daemons store log information of executed jobs? A. The scheduling daemons store log information of executed jobs in the /var/log/cron file.
